title: Whiskadelic Baguette Delight
description: A peppery and fluffy Venezuelan dish featuring a high-protein-friendly baguette.
instructions: Slice the baguette into thin slices and lightly toast them.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs until frothy.
Add chopped peppers and cilantro to the egg mixture and gently fold in.
Spread a layer of tomato sauce or guacamole on one slice of toasted baguette.
Gently spoon some of the whisked egg mixture over the spread topping.
Place another slice of toasted baguette on top, sealing it all together.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and set.
